The family Orchidaceae is one of the largest and most diverse families in the plant kingdom. intro: Scaphyglottis dubia is a species of flowering orchid native to Central and South America, characterized by its unique, slender flowers and delicate foliage. The plant is rich in bioactive constituents, including flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which have been shown to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, offering potential health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress and inflammation. The bioactive constituents of Scaphyglottis dubia have been found to include flavonoids like kaempferol and quercetin, as well as alkaloids like scaphyglottin and dubioside. In traditional medicine, Scaphyglottis dubia is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are valued for their potential to promote immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues.
